title: Kneiffia fruticosa
intro: Kneiffia fruticosa, also known as Picroside-containing Kneiffia fruticosa, is a plant species belonging to the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral activities, contributing to its potential in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The bioactive constituents of Kneiffia fruticosa include picroside, which is a major iridoid glycoside responsible for its pharmacological activities. Kneiffia fruticosa is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tablet, and is also used in some pharmaceutical products due to its potential therapeutic benefits.
